refnamediv.refpurpose: Tests if Polygons have exterior rings oriented counter-clockwise and interior rings oriented clockwise.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns true if all polygonal components of the input geometry use a counter-clockwise orientation for their exterior ring, and a clockwise direction for all interior rings.
Returns true if the geometry has no polygonal components.

note.para: Closed linestrings are not considered polygonal components, so you would still get a true return by passing a single closed linestring no matter its orientation.

If a polygonal geometry does not use reversed orientation for interior rings (i.e., if one or more interior rings are oriented in the same direction as an exterior ring) then both ST_IsPolygonCW and ST_IsPolygonCCW will return false.
